codeReview.summary: The navigation null check bug fix is correctly implemented for all 6 modules. State initializations changed from null to undefined, navigation handlers set undefined instead of null, and conditional checks use !== undefined instead of != null.

summary: PASS - The fix correctly addresses the bug where Tambah button showed List instead of Form. All 6 modules (COA, Aspek Kerja, Blok, Kas, Bank, Gudang) have been fixed with consistent pattern: state initialized as undefined, navigation handlers set undefined on new form navigation, and render conditions check !== undefined. Typecheck and lint passed.
